title: selaginella kunzeana
intro: Selaginella kunzeana, also known as Kunze's spike moss or Kunze's resurrection fern, is a type of evergreen, epiphytic plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health, reduced oxidative stress, and enhanced immune function. Selaginella kunzeana can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
